name: TELA Bio, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview We are a commercial-stage medical technology company focused on providing innovative soft-tissue reconstruction solutions that optimize clinical outcomes by prioritizing the preservation and restoration of the patients own anatomy. Our growing product portfolio is purposefully designed to leverage the patients natural healing response while minimizing long-term exposure to permanent synthetic materials.
